nodes.label: AI as tool for unfamiliar technical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I didn't have enough familiarity with any image-related python libraries, and figured ChatGPT would be faster than searching through StackOverflow

nodes.label: AI use in paper writing

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness for large datasets
nodes.grounding_span: at the moment I don't trust it's accuracy and refuse to use it on something that is to large for me to verify by hand
